message:
chore(beads): add testing notes to Console rendering primitives

Added comprehensive testing requirements to bd-nugw (Console rendering
primitives), which is a critical bottleneck blocking 6 downstream beads:
- Task inspector
- Obligation tracker
- Budget monitor
- Explain why diagnostics
- Region tree visualization
- Debug console E2E tests

Testing sections added:
- Terminal detection tests
- Color mode tests
- Styled text tests
- Color tests (16, 256, RGB)
- Unicode width tests
- Integration tests
- Logging requirements
- Test script

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
